Israel-Lebanon-US Tuesday Meeting — Israel Rejects Hezbollah Ceasefire

Active
Middle East conflictdiplomacy

Timeline

Direct US-Israel-Lebanon talks scheduled April 14 in Washington

Sources: Multiple feeds

2026-04-13

Sources: Multiple feeds

2026-04-13

Pope Leo XIV slams "delusion of omnipotence" stoking US-Israel war on Iran

Sources: Multiple feeds

2026-04-13

Netanyahu visited southern Lebanon, declaring "the threat has been eliminated"

Sources: SCMP (China-aligned), BBC (Western)

2026-04-13

Israeli strikes killed three in Gaza despite scheduled trilateral US-Israel-Lebanon meeting April 14

Sources: Multiple feeds

2026-04-13

Israeli envoy Yechiel Leiter — described as having "far-right ties" — is leading negotiations for Israel at the Washington talks

Sources: Multiple feeds

2026-04-13

Turkey's foreign minister warns Israel could act against Syria after Iran war

Sources: Middle East Eye (Middle East), 10:59 GMT

2026-04-12

US guarantees Beirut's safety until April 14 talks; negotiations at ambassador level at US State Department

Sources: Multiple feeds

2026-04-12

TASS: US, Lebanon asked Israel to pause attacks until talks begin — some Israeli officials agree

Source: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-11

Three-way call between Lebanon, Israel, and US — Tuesday meeting at State Department confirmed

Sources: BBC (Western), Al Jazeera (Middle East), MEE (Middle East)

2026-04-11

Israel says it will NOT negotiate ceasefire with Hezbollah, but WILL negotiate with Lebanon government

Sources: BBC (Western), Al Jazeera (Middle East), MEE (Middle East), JPost (Western/Israel)

2026-04-11

Israel excludes France from talks, calling it "biased mediator"

Sources: BBC (Western), Al Jazeera (Middle East), JPost (Western/Israel)

2026-04-11

US and Lebanon ask Israel to "pause" attacks on Hezbollah prior to talks

Sources: JPost (Western/Israel)

2026-04-11

JPost: Israel expels Spain from US coordination centre over "anti-Israel bias"

Sources: JPost (Western/Israel)

2026-04-11

Lebanon confirms first direct contact with Israel held ahead of US-brokered talks

Sources: The Hindu (India), BBC (Western), CGTN (China-aligned)

Hezbollah rocket damages 1,500-year-old church in northern Israel

Sources: BBC Middle East, Al Jazeera, Middle East Eye, RT

2026-04-10

Netanyahu removes Spain from Gaza coordination centre

Sources: BBC Middle East, Al Jazeera, Middle East Eye, RT

2026-04-10

Israel excludes France from talks, calling it "biased mediator"

Sources: BBC Middle East, Al Jazeera, Middle East Eye, TASS

2026-04-10

Hezbollah claims missile strike on Israeli navy base in Ashdod

Sources: BBC Middle East, Al Jazeera, Middle East Eye, TASS

2026-04-10

Three-way call produced agreement to meet at State Department on Tuesday

Sources: Middle East Eye (Live Blog), BBC Middle East, Al Jazeera

2026-04-10

Israel rejects ceasefire talks with Hezbollah; agrees only to negotiate directly with Lebanon government

Sources: Middle East Eye (Live Blog), BBC Middle East, Al Jazeera

2026-04-10

IDF claims 180 Hezbollah fighters killed Wednesday; Lebanon death toll now 357

Sources: Middle East Eye (Live Blog), BBC Middle East, Al Jazeera
